body:
## Problem

The /bands/<slug> SSR handler (api/meta/[...path].js:634-668) returns faqSchema (FAQPage) but NO MusicGroup or BreadcrumbList JSON-LD.

App.js emits MusicGroup client-side — invisible to crawlers. Same bug class as #1347 (lick pages SSR schema). /bands index (line 679-696) HAS CollectionPage + BreadcrumbList; individual band pages do not.

GSC signal: 'behemoth drum kit' pos 9.0. Band lane shipped (#1171-1174) but entity schema is crawler-invisible.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, band match return block (line 656-668)

Add to the return object:
- articleSchema: MusicGroup with name, url, genre array, member array (from BAND_DATA[slug])
- breadcrumbSchema: [{Home}, {Bands}, {band.name}]

BAND_DATA is already imported (line 15). All needed fields (name, genres, members, slug) are present.

## Expected page count
19 band pages

## Estimated organic uplift
- MusicGroup schema enables entity disambiguation for band-name queries ('behemoth drum kit' pos 9.0, 'metallica drummer kit')
- BreadcrumbList adds breadcrumb rich result to band SERPs
- Compounds active band lane (#1171-1174 shipped)

## Quality gate
- Valid @type:MusicGroup with name/url/genre/member on all 19 pages
- BreadcrumbList: Home > Bands > [Band Name]
- Google Rich Results Test passes on 2 sample band pages

## Verify
1. curl https://metalforge.io/api/meta?path=/bands/behemoth returns articleSchema with @type:MusicGroup
2. breadcrumbSchema array present with 3 items
3. Google Rich Results Test on /bands/behemoth shows MusicGroup + BreadcrumbList
4. FAQPage (faqSchema) still present — no regression
5. /bands index CollectionPage schema unchanged

## Done
When all 19 /bands/<slug> SSR responses include both MusicGroup JSON-LD and BreadcrumbList JSON-LD.
title: SEO batch: Band pages — MusicGroup + BreadcrumbList JSON-LD missing from SSR (~19 pages)
